Procs

proc createChatCompletion(api: OpenAiApi; model: string; systemPrompt: string;
                          input: string; responseFormat: JsonNode = nil): string {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a chat completion. Source   Edit   
proc createChatCompletion(api: OpenAiApi; req: CreateChatCompletionReq): CreateChatCompletionResp {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a chat completion without tool calling. Source   Edit   
proc createChatCompletionWithTools(api: OpenAiApi; req: CreateChatCompletionReq;
                                   tools: ToolsTable;
                                   callback: ChatCompletionCallback = nil): CreateChatCompletionResp {....raises: [
    JsonError, ValueError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, Exception,
    KeyError, IOError, OSError, JsonParsingError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a chat completion with tool calling. The callback is called after each response, allowing the caller to observe the conversation flow. Source   Edit   
proc newToolsTable(): ToolsTable {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new empty tools table Source   Edit   
proc next(s: OpenAIStream): Option[ChatCompletionChunk] {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
next iterates over the response stream. returns the next chunk an empty seq is returned when the stream has been closed. nb. streams must be iterated to completion to avoid leaking streams Source   Edit   
proc register(table: var ToolsTable; name: string; toolFunc: ToolFunction;
              impl: ToolImpl) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add a tool to the tools table Source   Edit

                          input: string): OpenAIStream {.
    ...raises: [CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a chat completion. Source   Edit   
proc streamChatCompletion(api: OpenAiApi; req: CreateChatCompletionReq): OpenAIStream {.
    ...raises: [CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
